'''âp-n-b''' ('''shapanab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nap|nap]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-n-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nap|nap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-n-b
|-
! Lemma
| shapanab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipanab|thipanab]] || [[word:jipanab|jipanab]] || [[word:shipanab|shipanab]] || [[word:kipanab|kipanab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupanab|thuthupanab]] || [[word:jujupanab|jujupanab]] || [[word:shushupanab|shushupanab]] || [[word:kukupanab|kukupanab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupanab|thupanab]] || [[word:jupanab|jupanab]] || [[word:shupanab|shupanab]] || [[word:kupanab|kupanab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupanab|thupanab]] || [[word:jupanab|jupanab]] || [[word:shupanab|shupanab]] || [[word:kupanab|kupanab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepanab|thepanab]] || [[word:jepanab|jepanab]] || [[word:shepanab|shepanab]] || [[word:kepanab|kepanab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopanab|thothopanab]] || [[word:jojopanab|jojopanab]] || [[word:shoshopanab|shoshopanab]] || [[word:kokopanab|kokopanab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopanab|thopanab]] || [[word:jopanab|jopanab]] || [[word:shopanab|shopanab]] || [[word:kopanab|kopanab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopanab|thopanab]] || [[word:jopanab|jopanab]] || [[word:shopanab|shopanab]] || [[word:kopanab|kopanab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚpanab|thĂŚpanab]] || [[word:jĂŚpanab|jĂŚpanab]] || [[word:shĂŚpanab|shĂŚpanab]] || [[word:kĂŚpanab|kĂŚpanab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapanab|thathapanab]] || [[word:jajapanab|jajapanab]] || [[word:shashapanab|shashapanab]] || [[word:kakapanab|kakapanab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapanab|thapanab]] || [[word:japanab|japanab]] || [[word:shapanab|shapanab]] || [[word:kapanab|kapanab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapanab|thapanab]] || [[word:japanab|japanab]] || [[word:shapanab|shapanab]] || [[word:kapanab|kapanab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapanab|shapanab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapanab|goshapanab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapanab|gokishapanab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapanabnĂź|shapanabnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapanabnknĂź|goshapanabnknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapanabnĂź|gokishapanabnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapanabshĂŤ|shapanabshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapanabnkshĂŤ|goshapanabnkshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapanabshĂŤ|gokishapanabshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapanabro|shapanabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapanabnkro|goshapanabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapanabro|gokishapanabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapanabmu|shapanabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapanabnkmu|goshapanabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapanabmu|gokishapanabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapanabsher|shapanabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapanabnksher|goshapanabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapanabsher|gokishapanabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapanabng|shapanabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapanabnkng|goshapanabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapanabng|gokishapanabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapanabya|shapanabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapanabnkya|goshapanabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapanabya|gokishapanabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapanabyam|shapanabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapanabnkyam|goshapanabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapanabyam|gokishapanabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapanabnĂźshĂŤ|shapanabnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapanabnknĂźshĂŤ|goshapanabnknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapanabnĂźshĂŤ|gokishapanabnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapanabnĂźro|shapanabnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapanabnknĂźro|goshapanabnknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapanabnĂźro|gokishapanabnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapanabnĂźmu|shapanabnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapanabnknĂźmu|goshapanabnknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapanabnĂźmu|gokishapanabnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapanabshĂŤnĂź|shapanabshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapanabnkshĂŤnĂź|goshapanabnkshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapanabshĂŤnĂź|gokishapanabshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapanabshĂŤro|shapanabshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapanabnkshĂŤro|goshapanabnkshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapanabshĂŤro|gokishapanabshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapanabshĂŤmu|shapanabshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapanabnkshĂŤmu|goshapanabnkshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapanabshĂŤmu|gokishapanabshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapanabronĂź|shapanabronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapanabnkronĂź|goshapanabnkronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapanabronĂź|gokishapanabronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapanabroshĂŤ|shapanabroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapanabnkroshĂŤ|goshapanabnkroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapanabroshĂŤ|gokishapanabroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapanabromu|shapanabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapanabnkromu|goshapanabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapanabromu|gokishapanabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapanabmunĂź|shapanabmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapanabnkmunĂź|goshapanabnkmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapanabmunĂź|gokishapanabmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapanabmushĂŤ|shapanabmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapanabnkmushĂŤ|goshapanabnkmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapanabmushĂŤ|gokishapanabmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapanabmuro|shapanabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapanabnkmuro|goshapanabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapanabmuro|gokishapanabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a27364f}}
